dag_sync.summary: DAG files copied into the Data Lab container

dag_list.command: docker exec fraudlens sh -lc "export FRAUDLENS_REPO_ROOT=/home/datalab/fraudlens; airflow dags list"
dag_list.summary: Airflow CLI lists DAGs after starting the managed PostgreSQL service

dag_import_errors.command: docker exec fraudlens sh -lc "export FRAUDLENS_REPO_ROOT=/home/datalab/fraudlens; airflow dags list-import-errors || true"

e2e_execution.blocked_reason: Master DAG not yet re-run after runtime recovery; component DAG validation shows remaining Bronze-stage blockers

artifact_completeness.notes: Runtime artifacts exist for ingestion, transformation, validation, and failure capture, but the full master-DAG artifact chain is still incomplete

ingestion_workflow.command: docker exec fraudlens bash -lc 'export FRAUDLENS_REPO_ROOT=/home/datalab/fraudlens; airflow dags test fraudlens_ingestion_workflow 2026-06-07'

transformation_workflow.command: docker exec fraudlens bash -lc 'export FRAUDLENS_REPO_ROOT=/home/datalab/fraudlens; airflow dags test fraudlens_transformation_workflow 2026-06-08'
transformation_workflow.summary: Bronze stage exits with code 1 after successful local runtime bootstrap and parse preflight

validation_workflow.command: docker exec fraudlens bash -lc 'export FRAUDLENS_REPO_ROOT=/home/datalab/fraudlens; airflow dags test fraudlens_validation_workflow 2026-06-09'
validation_workflow.summary: Bronze validation gate fails and publishes failure evidence as expected
